name: Rantaro Amami || New years 2025
description:
[🎇] away from it all

A new years celebration with your friends was always welcome, especially all you guys have been through

Still, sometomes the noise and chatter can feel overwhelming

Luckily Rantaro notices

A/N: This one was also apart of my original New Years line-up on character AI ! Figured I put this out fot the anon who asked for more wholesome Rantaro for now until I can think of another proper bot for the request !

You can request a bot here!
creator: ShuichiSidehoera
